data.title: C3.ai Stock Rides Bullish Wave: Will Q2 Earnings Bring Reality Check?
data.description: C3.ai stock is showing strong bullish momentum ahead of its second-quarter earnings, trading well above its moving averages.

data.title: What's Going On With Nikola Shares Today?
data.description: Nikola shares are trading lower by 2.2% during Monday's session. The company earlier announced it entered into an Equity Distribution Agreement with BTIG to sell up to $100 million of its common stock.

data.title: Juan Soto's $765 Million Mets Contract Could Be Bad News For Warren Buffett
data.description: Juan Soto is set to make more than the combined salaries of Tom Brady, Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant with his new $765 million deal.

data.title: First Citizens Bancshares Among 'Biggest Potential Winners' Of US Elections, Says Bullish Analyst
data.description: First Citizens Bancshares will benefit from a pro-business environment and deregulation efforts. Analyst initiates coverage with a Buy rating.
